Ezekiel 23

Select a column header to see its column.

The Two Adulterous Sisters

NoteOholah means her own tent or she worships at a tent shrine, a metaphor for Samaria as an adulteress with Assyria. NoteOholibah means the tent is in her or she is a tent shrine, a metaphor for Jerusalem as an adulterous wife.
NoteThat is, the Babylonians
NoteOr Babylonia; also in verse 16

Oholibah to Be Plagued

NoteLXX They will all come against you from the north

Judgment on Both Sisters

NoteLiterally passed their children, whom they bore to Me, through the fire
NoteHebrew they sent
NoteOr Sabeans
